diffs.diff:
--- a/smoke.py
+++ b/smoke.py
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+import sys, os, time

+print('start', flush=True)

+import torch

+print('torch', torch.__version__, 'cuda', torch.cuda.is_available(), flush=True)

+from torch_geometric.data import Data

+from torch_geometric.loader import DataLoader

+from torch_geometric.nn.models import SchNet

+print('imports ok', flush=True)

+

+DATA_DIR = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')

+print('loading val...', flush=True)

+t0=time.time()

+raw = torch.load(os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'val_3d.pt'), weights_only=False)

+print(f'val loaded {len(raw)} in {time.time()-t0:.1f}s', flush=True)

+print('sample', raw[0], flush=True)

+

+graphs = [Data(z=m['z'].long(), pos=m['pos'].float(), y=torch.tensor([float(m['target'])])) for m in raw[:512]]

+loader = DataLoader(graphs, batch_size=64, shuffle=False)

+device = torch.device('cuda')

+model = SchNet(hidden_channels=64, num_filters=64, num_interactions=3, num_gaussians=25, cutoff=10.0).to(device)

+print('model built', flush=True)

+for b in loader:

+    b = b.to(device)

+    out = model(b.z, b.pos, b.batch)

+    print('out shape', out.shape, flush=True)

+    break

+print('done', flush=True)
